details.test: Task 1: Hire cheapest electric hoist (3 days, depot pickup)
Task 2: Hire two hoists for weekend with standard delivery
Task 3: Create quote for two items with common 5-day hire and postcode
Task 4: Save lightest hoist under $150/day to wishlist via comparison
Task 5: Weekend 3-day hire and proceed to checkout with contact/address
Task 6: Register account and save electric hoist safety guide
Task 7: Compare hoists and hire one with longest chain length
Task 8: Hire outdoor-rated IP65+ hoist with site delivery and rooftop note
